mapper.select: SELECT w.id AS worker_pk, w.person_id AS person_link, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.email, p.phone, w.job_title, w.salary, w.team_id FROM Workers w JOIN People p ON w.person_id = p.id WHERE w.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Workers (person_id, job_title, salary, team_id) VALUES (#{personId}, #{jobTitle}, #{salary}, #{teamId})
mapper.select: SELECT w.id AS worker_pk, w.person_id AS person_link, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.email, p.phone, w.job_title, w.salary, w.team_id FROM Workers w JOIN People p ON w.person_id = p.id
